subcodes.first_line: Long have the breezes of love been stayed from wafting from thy direction, and this servant, mindful of prudence, remaineth vigilant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عهدهاست که نسایم محبت از شطر آنجناب مرور ننمود و این عبد هم ناظرا الی الحفظ
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @blind imitation [taqlid]
